texto: The biggest thing, I think, is to stay healthy and make the fewest mistakes, and then you can win... The margin of error is so small in the NFL, so if you can do those two things - keep your team healthy and make the fewest mistakes each Sunday - you have a good chance of going to the Super Bowl.
explicacao: Citação de Hugh Douglas sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “The biggest thing, I think, is to stay healthy and make the fewest mistakes, and then you can win…” articula reflexao, good, team em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como team e mistakes.
